CustomField.description: Required when nepa_waiver_invoked__c is true. Must cite the specific statutory provision authorizing the NEPA waiver (e.g., IIRIRA Section 102(c); EPAct 2005 Section 390). VR-003 blocks save when this is blank and nepa_waiver_invoked__c is true.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Statutory citation for the NEPA waiver (e.g., IIRIRA 102(c)). Required when waiver is invoked.
CustomField.label: Waiver Statute Citation
